context.audience: Backend and full-stack developers building knowledge bases, enterprise developers adding AI to existing data, indie hackers creating AI-powered search tools
pain_points: Choosing the right chunk size and overlap for retrieval quality
Managing embedding costs at scale with large document sets
Latency trade-offs between vector search speed and accuracy
Reranking strategies for improving top-k retrieval precision
content_that_works: Chunk size and embedding strategy comparisons
